This is regarding incidents on the production line at the Apex Manufacturing plant at 700 Foundry Lane in Cleveland. Beginning around late September 2024 and continuing through at least mid-January 2025, the day-shift line lead, a man whose first name is Greg, has repeatedly made sexually explicit comments toward two of my coworkers and toward me. He has placed his hand on my lower back at least three times after I asked him not to. On December 14th around 10 AM he cornered one of the temp workers in the supply closet for several minutes. She came out crying and told me what happened. I reported it to the HR coordinator on December 17th in writing. I have a copy of that email. As of February 1st, no action has been taken against him and he is still on the same shift. I am asking that this complaint be added to the file with my prior report.
